006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.util.*;
025import java.util.function.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
033
034/**
035 * JSON5-flavored {@link MarshalledList}.
036 *
037 * <p>
038 * Carries the JSON5-specific surface that historically lived on {@link JsonList}: a JSON5
039 * {@link #toString()}, JSON5 default-parser constructors, and convenience methods for working with
040 * JSON5 array text.
041 *
042 * <p>
043 * For strict (RFC 8259) JSON behavior, use {@link JsonList}. For a neutral, marshaller-agnostic
044 * base with no language coupling, use {@link MarshalledList}.
045 *
046 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
047 * <p class='bjava'>
048 *    <jc>// Construct an empty list</jc>
049 *    Json5List <jv>list</jv> = Json5List.<jsm>of</jsm>();
050 *
051 *    <jc>// Construct a list of generic Json5Map objects from JSON5</jc>
052    *    <jv>list</jv> = Json5List.<jsm>ofString</jsm>(<js>"[{foo:'bar'},{baz:'bing'}]"</js>);
053 *
054 *    <jc>// JSON5 round-trip via toString()</jc>
055 *    String <jv>s</jv> = <jv>list</jv>.toString();  <jc>// "[{foo:'bar'},{baz:'bing'}]"</jc>
056 * </p>
057 *
058 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
059 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe.
060 * </ul>
061 *
062 * @serial exclude
063 */
064@SuppressWarnings({
065   "java:S110",  // Class has many fields, acceptable for collection implementation
066   "java:S1206", // Inherits equals/hashCode from MarshalledList; List equality is element-based
067   "java:S2160"  // equals() inherited from MarshalledList; element-based equality is correct
068})
069public class Json5List extends MarshalledList {
070   @SuppressWarnings({
071      "java:S110" // Inner class has many fields, acceptable for collection implementation
072   })
073   private static class UnmodifiableJson5List extends Json5List {
074      private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
075
076      @SuppressWarnings({
077         "synthetic-access" // Access to outer class members is intentional
078      })
079      UnmodifiableJson5List(Json5List contents) {
080         if (nn(contents))
081            contents.forEach(super::add);
082      }
083
084      @Override /* Overridden from List */
085      public void add(int location, Object object) {
086         throw uoroex();
087      }
088
089      @Override
090      public boolean isUnmodifiable() { return true; }
091
092      @Override /* Overridden from List */
093      public Object remove(int location) {
094         throw uoroex();
095      }
096
097      @Override /* Overridden from List */
098      public Object set(int location, Object object) {
099         throw uoroex();
100      }
101   }
102
103   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
104
105   /**
106    * An empty read-only Json5List.
107    *
108    * @serial exclude
109    */
110   @SuppressWarnings({
111      "java:S110", // Anonymous class has many fields, acceptable for collection implementation
112      "java:S2386" // Public static final field accessed externally, cannot be protected
113   })
114   public static final Json5List EMPTY_LIST = new Json5List() {
115      private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
116
117      @Override /* Overridden from List */
118      public void add(int location, Object object) {
119         throw uoroex();
120      }
121
122      @Override /* Overridden from List */
123      public ListIterator<Object> listIterator(int location) {
124         return Collections.emptyList().listIterator(location);
125      }
126
127      @Override /* Overridden from List */
128      public Object remove(int location) {
129         throw uoroex();
130      }
131
132      @Override /* Overridden from List */
133      public Object set(int location, Object object) {
134         throw uoroex();
135      }
136
137      @Override /* Overridden from List */
138      public List<Object> subList(int start, int end) {
139         return Collections.emptyList().subList(start, end);
140      }
141   };
142
143   /**
144    * Construct an empty list.
145    *
146    * @return An empty list.
147    */
148   public static Json5List create() {
149      return new Json5List();
150   }
151
152   /**
153    * Construct a list initialized with the specified list.
154    *
155    * @param values The list to copy. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
156    * @return A new list or <jk>null</jk> if the list was <jk>null</jk>.
157    */
158   public static Json5List of(Collection<?> values) {
159      return values == null ? null : new Json5List(values);
160   }
161
162   /**
163    * Construct a list initialized with the specified values.
164    *
165    * @param values The values to add to this list.
166    * @return A new list, never <jk>null</jk>.
167    */
168   public static Json5List of(Object...values) {
169      return new Json5List(values);
170   }
171
172   /**
173    * Convenience method for creating a list of array objects.
174    *
175    * @param values The initial values.
176    * @return A new list.
177    */
178   public static Json5List ofArrays(Object[]...values) {
179      var l = new Json5List();
180      Collections.addAll(l, values);
181      return l;
182   }
183
184   /**
185    * Convenience method for creating a list of collection objects.
186    *
187    * @param values The initial values.
188    * @return A new list.
189    */
190   public static Json5List ofCollections(Collection<?>...values) {
191      var l = new Json5List();
192      Collections.addAll(l, values);
193      return l;
194   }
195
196   /**
197    * Construct a list initialized with the specified JSON5 string.
198    *
199    * @param json5 The JSON5 text to parse.
200    * @return A new list (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
201    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
202    */
203   public static Json5List ofString(CharSequence json5) throws ParseException {
204      return json5 == null ? new Json5List() : new Json5List(json5);
205   }
206
207   /**
208    * Construct a list initialized with the specified reader containing JSON5.
209    *
210    * @param json5 The reader containing JSON5 text to parse.
211    * @return A new list (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
212    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
213    */
214   public static Json5List ofString(Reader json5) throws ParseException {
215      return json5 == null ? new Json5List() : new Json5List(json5);
216   }
217
218   /**
219    * Parses a string that can consist of either a JSON5 array or comma-delimited list.
220    *
221    * <p>
222    * The type of string is auto-detected.
223    *
224    * @param s The string to parse.
225    * @return A new list (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk> or empty), never <jk>null</jk>.
226    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
227    */
228   public static Json5List ofJson5OrCdl(String s) throws ParseException {
229      if (Shorts.ie(s))  // NOAI
230         return new Json5List();
231      if (! isProbablyJsonArray(s, true))
232         return new Json5List((Object[])splita(s.trim(), ','));
233      return new Json5List(s);
234   }
235
236   /**
237    * Construct a list initialized with the specified string.
238    *
239    * @param in The input being parsed.
240    * @param p The parser to use. If <jk>null</jk>, uses {@link Json5Parser}.
241    * @return A new list (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
242    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
243    */
244   public static Json5List ofString(CharSequence in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
245      return in == null ? new Json5List() : new Json5List(in, p);
246   }
247
248   /**
249    * Construct a list initialized with the specified reader.
250    *
251    * @param in The reader containing the input being parsed.
252    * @param p The parser to use. If <jk>null</jk>, uses {@link Json5Parser}.
253    * @return A new list (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
254    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
255    */
256   @SuppressWarnings({
257      "java:S1172" // Parameter reserved for future parser context support
258   })
259   public static Json5List ofString(Reader in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
260      return in == null ? new Json5List() : new Json5List(in);
261   }
262
263   /**
264    * Construct an empty list.
265    */
266   public Json5List() {}
267
268   /**
269    * Construct an empty list with the specified bean context.
270    *
271    * @param session The bean session to use for creating beans.
272    */
273   public Json5List(MarshallingSession session) {
274      super(session);
275   }
276
277   /**
278    * Construct a list initialized with the specified JSON5 text.
279    *
280    * @param json5 The JSON5 text to parse.
281    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
282    */
283   public Json5List(CharSequence json5) throws ParseException {
284      this(json5, Json5Parser.DEFAULT);
285   }
286
287   /**
288    * Construct a list initialized with the specified string.
289    *
290    * @param in The input being parsed. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
291    * @param p The parser to use. If <jk>null</jk>, uses {@link Json5Parser}.
292    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
293    */
294   public Json5List(CharSequence in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
295      super(in, p == null ? Json5Parser.DEFAULT : p);
296   }
297
298   /**
299    * Construct a list initialized with the specified list.
300    *
301    * @param copyFrom The list to copy. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
302    */
303   public Json5List(Collection<?> copyFrom) {
304      super(copyFrom);
305   }
306
307   /**
308    * Construct a list initialized with the contents.
309    *
310    * @param entries The entries to add to this list.
311    */
312   public Json5List(Object...entries) {
313      super(entries);
314   }
315
316   /**
317    * Construct a list initialized with the specified reader containing JSON5.
318    *
319    * @param json5 The reader containing JSON5 text to parse.
320    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
321    */
322   public Json5List(Reader json5) throws ParseException {
323      this(json5, Json5Parser.DEFAULT);
324   }
325
326   /**
327    * Construct a list initialized with the specified reader and parser.
328    *
329    * @param in The reader containing the input being parsed.
330    * @param p The parser to use. If <jk>null</jk>, uses {@link Json5Parser}.
331    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
332    */
333   public Json5List(Reader in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
334      super(in, p == null ? Json5Parser.DEFAULT : p);
335   }
336
337   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
338   public Json5List append(Collection<?> values) {
339      super.append(values);
340      return this;
341   }
342
343   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
344   public Json5List append(Object value) {
345      super.append(value);
346      return this;
347   }
348
349   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
350   public Json5List append(Object...values) {
351      super.append(values);
352      return this;
353   }
354
355   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
356   public Json5List appendIf(boolean flag, Object value) {
357      super.appendIf(flag, value);
358      return this;
359   }
360
361   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
362   public <T> Json5List appendIf(Predicate<T> test, T value) {
363      super.appendIf(test, value);
364      return this;
365   }
366
367   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
368   public Json5List appendReverse(List<?> values) {
369      super.appendReverse(values);
370      return this;
371   }
372
373   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
374   public Json5List appendReverse(Object...values) {
375      super.appendReverse(values);
376      return this;
377   }
378
379   /**
380    * Converts this object into the specified class type.
381    *
382    * <p>
383    * This method performs a round-trip serialization and deserialization to convert the list into the target type.
384    *
385    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
386    *    <li class='warn'>The current implementation uses a serialization round-trip which may be inefficient for
387    *       frequent conversions of large objects. Consider caching results or using direct object conversion where possible.
388    * </ul>
389    *
390    * @param cm The class type to convert this object to.
391    * @return A converted object.
392    */
393   public Object cast(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
394      try {
395         return Json5Parser.DEFAULT.parse(Json5Serializer.DEFAULT.serialize(this), cm);
396      } catch (ParseException | SerializeException e) {
397         throw toRex(e);
398      }
399   }
400
401   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
402   public Json5List getList(int index) {
403      return get(index, Json5List.class);
404   }
405
406   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
407   public Json5Map getMap(int index) {
408      return get(index, Json5Map.class);
409   }
410
411   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
412   public Json5List modifiable() {
413      if (isUnmodifiable())
414         return new Json5List(this);
415      return this;
416   }
417
418   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
419   public Json5List session(MarshallingSession session) {
420      super.session(session);
421      return this;
422   }
423
424   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
425   public Json5List setBeanSession(MarshallingSession value) {
426      super.setBeanSession(value);
427      return this;
428   }
429
430   /**
431    * Serializes this list to a JSON5 string.
432    *
433    * <p>
434    * A synonym for {@link #toString()}.
435    *
436    * @return This object as a JSON5 string.
437    */
438   public String toJson5() {
439      return Json5.of(this);
440   }
441
442   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
443   public String toString() {
444      return Json5.of(this);
445   }
446
447   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledList */
448   public Json5List unmodifiable() {
449      if (this instanceof UnmodifiableJson5List this2)
450         return this2;
451      return new UnmodifiableJson5List(this);
452   }
453
454   /**
455    * Convenience method for serializing this list to the specified Writer using the {@link Json5Serializer#DEFAULT}
456    * serializer.
457    *
458    * @param w The writer to send the serialized contents of this object.
459    * @return This object.
460    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred trying to write to the writer.
461    * @throws SerializeException If a problem occurred trying to convert the output.
462    */
463   public Json5List writeTo(Writer w) throws IOException, SerializeException {
464      Json5Serializer.DEFAULT.serialize(this, w);
465      return this;
466   }
467}
